title: manifest, push: implement `--add-compression` to push with compressed variants.
body:
This is a feature PR for containers/image feature merged in below PR:
* https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2023
* https://github.com/containers/image/pull/1987
* https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2029


Adds a new flag  **--add-compression <compression>**  to manifest push, which when added will push existing manifest on host while replicating the instances with required compression.

```release-note
manifest, push: implement --add-compression to push with compressed variants.
```


Similar implementation to: https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/4912

comments.body: Suspecting issues due to some change in `c/common` testing it here: https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/19472
